sections.paragraph: and שִׁלְשֹׁם adv. (comp. of שֵׁלֶשׁ = שָׁלשׁ and יֹום), the day before yesterday, Pro 22:20 [כתיב]; elsewhere always joined with תְּמֹול; as תְּמֹול שִׁלְשֹׁום yesterday (and) the third day, Exo 5:8 and גַּם אֶתְמֹול גַּם שִׁלְשֹׁום 2Sa 5:2, heretofore, formerly. כִּתְמֹול שִׁלְשֹׁום as before-time, Gen 31:2 2Ki 13:5. מִתְּמֹול שִׁלְשֹׁום in time past, Deu 19:6 Jos 20:5.
